Artemisinin won the Nobel Prize for its unprecedented malaria clearance rate.

The stomach lining regenerates rapidly, but needs alkaline herbs to heal.

It functions as an anti-inflammatory, stopping root-level toothaches fast.

H. pylori infections are often aggravated by over-the-counter antacids.

Unlike synthetic drugs, it has a near-zero resistance footprint.

Qinghao literally suffocates the parasite deep within your red blood cells.

Omega-3 fatty acids are essential but cannot be generated by your own body.

Traditional chemical pastes disrupt the microscopic natural flora of your mouth.

It physically draws out inflammatory toxins during standard menstrual flow.

Poor quality pads are a leading cause of recurring secondary pelvic infections.
